topic: Settings JSON shape that the Property Inspector emits and that the SDK forwards to S3 as didReceiveSettings
direction: S2 emits settings of this shape; S3 forwards them unchanged to S4 via onDidReceiveSettings

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling cadence in milliseconds. Default 2000. Minimum 250 (enforced by PI input attributes).

placeholder.description: Text to display in the 'title' slot when nothing is playing. Default 'Apple Music'.

showArtist.description: When false, the artist slot is rendered as an empty string regardless of source data. Default true.

settings_object.note_on_missing_fields: S4 must treat any missing field as 'use the default'. Empty settings object (the SDK's default initial state) means: pollIntervalMs=2000, placeholder='Apple Music', showArtist=true.

pi_emission_mechanism.when: On change of any PI form control
pi_emission_mechanism.constraint: The settings argument is exactly an object matching settings_object above; no nesting under 'config' or similar.

verification: Edge-case-testing mounts the PI in a stub host that captures setSettings calls. For each PI control, change its value and assert that the captured settings object's corresponding field matches and that no other top-level keys appear.
